title: Unable to login
description: Customer cannot log into the account after password reset.

title: Payment failed during checkout
description: Customer reports that payment fails when using credit card.

title: Order not delivered
description: Customer has not received the order even after delivery date.

title: Wrong item received
description: Customer received a different product than what was ordered.

title: Refund request
description: Customer requested a refund due to damaged product.

title: App crashing on startup
description: Customer reports that the mobile app crashes immediately after opening.

title: Unable to update profile
description: Customer cannot save changes in the profile settings page.

title: Discount code not working
description: Customer tried to apply promo code but it shows invalid.

title: Email notifications not received
description: Customer is not receiving order confirmation emails.

title: Account locked
description: Customer account locked after multiple login attempts.

title: Shipping address change request
description: Customer wants to change the shipping address after placing order.

title: Product warranty inquiry
description: Customer asking about warranty coverage for purchased item.

title: Subscription cancellation request
description: Customer wants to cancel the monthly subscription plan.

title: Slow website performance
description: Customer reports pages loading very slowly.
